summary: Tested 11 Turkish hotel PMS calendar improvements. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend calendar features verified: Rezervasyonlar button visible, Tarihe Git date picker popup with date input and Bugun button working, calendar legend shows green/red/gray colors correctly, Rezervasyon ekle dialog has room type and room selection dropdowns. Code review confirmed ReservationDetailModal has all required tabs (Iptal, Voucher, Fatura, Oda Degistir, Cari Transfer) with complete implementations.
critical_code_review_comments: ReservationDetailModal.js has 1375 lines - consider splitting into smaller modules for maintainability
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Created test cari accounts during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for calendar improvements all working: available-rooms-by-type, voucher generation, invoice-charges, generate-invoice, cancel reservation, cari-accounts/create. Frontend calendar at /reservation-calendar has all requested features. ReservationDetailModal (accessible via double-click on booking bar) has tabs: Genel Bilgiler, Misafirler, Folyolar, Gunluk Fiyatlar, Ek Ucretler, Oda Degistir, Iptal, Voucher, Fatura, Depozito, Iletisim, Notlar, Gecmis.
frontend_tests_passed: Tarihe Git date picker - popup opens with date input and Bugun button
Calendar legend - shows green (Iceride), red (Gecmis/Check-out), gray (Gelecek)
Rezervasyon ekle - dialog has room type and room selection dropdowns
modal_tabs_verified_via_code_review: CancelTab - has cancel type select, reason input, no-show checkbox with charge options
VoucherTab - has generate voucher button, print/PDF functionality
InvoiceTab - has billing info form, charge selection checkboxes, generate invoice button
RoomChangeTab - has room type select, room select, upgrade pricing section with pricing options
